// Wake Word button state let wakeWordActive = false; function setWakeWordActive(active) { wakeWordActive = active; const btn = document.getElementById('wakeWordBtn'); if (btn) { if (active) { btn.style.background = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3)'; btn.style.borderColor = '#10b981'; btn.style.boxShadow = '0 0 10px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.6)'; } else { btn.style.background = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.12)'; btn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.4)'; btn.style.boxShadow = 'none'; } } } // Debug display for voice mode window.debugVoiceStatus = function(status, timer, log) { const debug = document.getElementById('voiceDebug'); if (!debug) return; if (document.getElementById('ui').classList.contains('fullscreen')) { debug.style.display = 'block'; } else { debug.style.display = 'none'; } document.getElementById('debugStatus').textContent = status || '-'; document.getElementById('debugTimer').textContent = timer || '-'; if (log) { const logDiv = document.getElementById('debugLog'); logDiv.textContent = log.slice(-100); // Last 100 chars } };
